pet.name: Clementine
pet.breedColor: long-haired British Longhair with a soft dove-grey coat and round copper eyes

memories.quirks: the way you waited on the third stair every evening, exactly where the last of the light landed
memories.favoriteRitual: the slow first coffee, you curled against my arm before the day could start
memories.favoriteSpots: the warm square of windowsill above the radiator, and the folded blanket at the foot of the bed
memories.nicknames: Clem, Miss Clementine, the small grey shadow
